translations.es: Hoy voy a visitar a mi abuelo.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui je vais voir mon grand-père.
translations.it: Oggi vado a trovare mio nonno.
translations.he: היום אני הולך לבקר את סבא שלי.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi đi thăm ông.
translations.nl: Vandaag ga ik op bezoek bij mijn opa.
translations.hi: आज मैं दादाजी से मिलने जा रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Σήμερα θα επισκεφτώ τον παππού μου.
translations.nb: I dag skal jeg besøke bestefaren min.
translations.id: Hari ini saya mengunjungi kakek saya.
translations.sv: I dag ska jag hälsa på min farfar.
translations.da: I dag besøger jeg min bedstefar.
translations.ja: 今日はおじいちゃんに会いに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; functions as the subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative 1st person singular; main predicate; transitive verb selecting an accusative object.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine accusative singular; modifies the noun 'Großvater' and agrees in case, gender, and number.
Common noun, masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'besuche'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the predicate to indicate the time of the event.

sentences.target: Mein Großvater kocht heute die Suppe.

translations.de: Mein Großvater kocht heute die Suppe.
translations.en: My grandfather is cooking the soup today.
translations.es: Hoy mi abuelo cocina la sopa.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui mon grand-père prépare la soupe.
translations.it: Oggi mio nonno cucina la zuppa.
translations.pt: Hoje meu avô faz a sopa.
translations.he: היום סבא שלי מבשל את המרק.
translations.vi: Hôm nay ông tôi nấu canh.
translations.nl: Vandaag kookt mijn opa de soep.
translations.hu: Ma a nagyapám főzi a levest.
translations.hi: आज दादाजी सूप पका रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα ο παππούς μου μαγειρεύει τη σούπα.
translations.id: Hari ini kakek saya memasak sop.
translations.da: I dag laver min bedstefar suppe.
translations.ja: 今日はおじいちゃんがスープを作っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine nominative; modifies 'Großvater' as the subject.
Common noun, masculine nominative singular; subject of 'kocht'.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; main predicate; transitive here with 'die Suppe' as accusative object.
Temporal adverb; modifies the predicate to indicate the time.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner for 'Suppe' marking it as the direct object.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'kocht'.

translations.en: My grandfather is sitting in the garden.
translations.es: Mi abuelo está sentado en el jardín.
translations.fr: Mon grand-père est assis dans le jardin.
translations.it: Mio nonno è seduto in giardino.
translations.pt: Meu avô está sentado no jardim.
translations.vi: Ông tôi đang ngồi trong vườn.
translations.nl: Mijn opa zit in de tuin.
translations.hi: मेरे दादाजी बगीचे में बैठे हैं.
translations.el: Ο παππούς μου κάθεται στον κήπο.
translations.id: Kakek saya sedang duduk di kebun.
translations.ja: おじいちゃんは庭に座っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine nominative; modifies 'Großvater' as the subject.
Common noun, masculine nominative singular; subject of 'sitzt'.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; intransitive posture verb; predicate complemented by a locative prepositional phrase.
Contracted preposition ('in' + definite article 'dem'); heads a prepositional phrase and governs dative case indicating location.
Common noun, masculine dative singular; object of the preposition 'im' (locative complement).

sentences.target: Morgen fährt Großvater mit uns zum See.
sentences.reading: /ˈmɔʁɡn̩ fɛːɐ̯t ˈɡʁoːsˌfaːtɐ mɪt ʊns tsʊm zeː/

translations.de: Morgen fährt Großvater mit uns zum See.
translations.ipa: /ˈmɔʁɡn̩ fɛːɐ̯t ˈɡʁoːsˌfaːtɐ mɪt ʊns tsʊm zeː/
translations.en: Tomorrow, Grandfather is going to the lake with us.
translations.es: Mañana mi abuelo va con nosotros al lago.
translations.fr: Demain mon grand-père va au lac avec nous.
translations.it: Domani mio nonno viene al lago con noi.
translations.zh-Hans: 明天爷爷和我们一起去湖边。
translations.yue: 聽日阿爺會同我哋去湖邊。
translations.ru: Завтра дедушка поедет с нами на озеро.
translations.pt: Amanhã meu avô vai ao lago com a gente.
translations.vi: Ngày mai ông tôi đi ra hồ với chúng tôi.
translations.ar: غدًا سيذهب جدي معنا إلى البحيرة.
translations.nl: Morgen gaat mijn opa met ons naar het meer.
translations.uk: Завтра дідусь поїде з нами до озера.
translations.hu: Holnap a nagyapám velünk megy a tóhoz.
translations.hi: कल दादाजी हमारे साथ झील पर जा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Jutro dziadek jedzie z nami nad jezioro.
translations.el: Αύριο ο παππούς θα πάει μαζί μας στη λίμνη.
translations.nb: I morgen drar bestefar med oss til innsjøen.
translations.id: Besok kakek saya pergi ke danau bersama kami.
translations.sv: I morgon följer farfar med oss till sjön.
translations.ro: Mâine bunicul merge cu noi la lac.
translations.cs: Zítra pojede dědeček s námi k jezeru.
translations.da: I morgen tager bedstefar med os til søen.
translations.fi: Huomenna isoisä lähtee meidän kanssa järvelle.
translations.ja: 明日、おじいちゃんは私たちといっしょに湖へ行きます。

Common noun, masculine dative singular; object of the preposition 'zum' (destination complement).
